visual_description: Three men in dark suits walk away down a dimly lit hallway, their backs to the camera. The scene cuts to two men in suits standing side by side, looking forward with serious expressions. Then a man in a light blue shirt and tie stands in a control room, facing the camera while other men sit and stand behind him near computer monitors.
